summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Content Management and Analytics pages. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Analytics dashboard shows KPIs, subscription distribution, revenue breakdown, popular subjects, content summary, user growth chart, and top creators. Content Management shows content stats, most active creators, and lessons table with search/preview/delete functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics/overview returns user_growth array
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics/overview returns lesson_trends array
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics/overview returns subscription_distribution array
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics/overview returns popular_subjects array
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics/content returns content_stats object with lessons, notes, schemes, templates, dictations, shared_links
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics/content returns most_active_users array with name, email, lesson_count
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics/revenue returns revenue_breakdown array with _id, count, revenue
Backend: GET /api/admin/content/lessons returns lessons array
Backend: GET /api/admin/content/lessons returns total count
Backend: GET /api/admin/content/lessons supports pagination (skip, limit)
Backend: GET /api/admin/content/lessons returns lessons with expected structure
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/content/lessons/{lesson_id} returns 404 for nonexistent lesson
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics/overview requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics/content requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/admin/content/lessons requires authentication (401)
Frontend: /admin/dashboard renders AnalyticsReports with data-testid='analytics-reports'
Frontend: /admin/dashboard shows KPI cards (data-testid: kpi-cards, kpi-users, kpi-revenue, kpi-lessons, kpi-active)
Frontend: /admin/dashboard shows Subscription Distribution section (data-testid: sub-distribution)
Frontend: /admin/dashboard shows Revenue by Plan section (data-testid: revenue-breakdown)
Frontend: /admin/dashboard shows Popular Subjects section (data-testid: popular-subjects)
Frontend: /admin/dashboard shows Content Summary section (data-testid: content-summary)
Frontend: /admin/dashboard shows User Signups chart (data-testid: user-growth)
Frontend: /admin/dashboard shows Top Content Creators (data-testid: top-users)
Frontend: /admin/analytics renders same AnalyticsReports component
Frontend: /admin/content renders ContentManagement with data-testid='content-management'
Frontend: /admin/content shows content stats grid (data-testid: content-stats) with 6 stat cards
Frontend: /admin/content shows Most Active Content Creators (data-testid: active-users)
Frontend: /admin/content shows lessons table (data-testid: lessons-table)
Frontend: /admin/content has search input (data-testid: lesson-search) that filters lessons
Frontend: /admin/content has pagination buttons (data-testid: prev-page, next-page)
Frontend: /admin/content has preview buttons per lesson row (data-testid: preview-lesson-{i})
Frontend: /admin/content has delete buttons per lesson row (data-testid: delete-lesson-{i})
Frontend: Preview button toggles lesson content expansion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content Management and Analytics pages fully implemented and tested. Analytics endpoints at /api/admin/analytics/overview, /api/admin/analytics/content, /api/admin/analytics/revenue work correctly. Content endpoints at /api/admin/content/lessons work correctly with pagination. Frontend routes /admin/dashboard, /admin/analytics both render AnalyticsReports component. /admin/content renders ContentManagement component with stats, active users, and lessons table with search/preview/delete.

backend_api.analytics_content: Returns content_stats (lessons, notes, schemes, templates, dictations, shared_links) and most_active_users
backend_api.analytics_revenue: Returns revenue_breakdown with plan, count, revenue
backend_api.content_lessons: Returns lessons array with total count, supports pagination

frontend_ui.analytics_dashboard: Shows KPIs (users, revenue, lessons, active), subscription distribution bars, revenue by plan, popular subjects, content summary, user growth chart, top creators
frontend_ui.content_management: Shows content stats grid (6 cards), most active creators list, lessons table with search/preview/delete, pagination
